CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT addr, IPv6StringToNumOrNull(addr) AS num FROM ipv6_addresses;
SELECT addr, num FROM test_results WHERE num IS NOT NULL;
SELECT addr, num FROM test_results WHERE IPv6StringToNumOrNull(addr) IS NULL;
SELECT addr, IF(IPv6StringToNumOrNull(addr) IS NULL, 'Invalid IPv6', 'Valid IPv6') AS validation FROM ipv6_addresses;
WITH (SELECT IPv6StringToNumOrNull(addr) FROM ipv6_addresses WHERE addr IS NOT NULL) AS converted ADDITIONAL_RESULTS AS SELECT COUNT(*) AS valid_count FROM converted WHERE converted IS NOT NULL;
SELECT addr, CASE WHEN IPv6StringToNumOrNull(addr) IS NULL THEN 'Invalid' ELSE 'Valid' END AS validation_status FROM ipv6_addresses;
CREATE TABLE temp_result AS SELECT addr, IPv6StringToNumOrNull(addr) AS num FROM ipv6_addresses WHERE LENGTH(addr) < 39;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_result WHERE num IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ipv6_addresses WHERE addr LIKE '%:%' AND IPv6StringToNumOrNull(addr) IS NULL;
